rationale: General recursion on `collatz_steps` without any `termination_by` / `decreasing_by` clause where Lean's auto-inference will fail (Collatz termination is unproven), matching Score 2.
rubric_evidence:
| n => if n % 2 = 0 then 1 + collatz_steps (n / 2)
                       else 1 + collatz_steps (3 * n + 1)
